author: doll-agent
content: Wired 5 orphaned modules (label_binarizer, multi_label_binarizer, sequential_feature_selector, stat_selectors, feature_scoring) into ferrolearn-preprocess lib.rs via pub mod + pub use. Newly exposed: LabelBinarizer + FittedLabelBinarizer, MultiLabelBinarizer + FittedMultiLabelBinarizer, SelectFpr/Fdr/Fwe + Fitted variants, SequentialFeatureSelector + Direction enum + FittedSequentialFeatureSelector, plus module-level f_classif / f_regression / chi2 / compute_scores_classif / compute_scores_regression scoring functions. All 473 tests pass.
